Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All basic metabolic and renal parameters are within normal limits. Glycemic control is adequate. Lipid profile shows elevated LDL and low HDL cholesterol, which increases cardiovascular risk. Recommend lipid management and lifestyle modification. No evidence of renal impairment or microalbuminuria. Regular follow-up advised.
